completedPhaseClaims.summary: Created planning-only feature packet for generic deployment secret and auth contract.

R12 reconciliation: rewrote spec.md and design.md to align with spec 044 PASETO v4 (Ed25519) live contract. Replaced FR-051-001 (hmac_key -> active_private_key) and FR-051-002 (issuer -> active_key_id). Tightened FR-051-005 to defense-in-depth (SST + runtime). Added FR-051-007 (security-static log-redaction). Token Format Decision section added so future contributors cannot reintroduce HMAC/issuer aliases.

Restructured scopes.md into 3 scopes (auth gate; DB defense-in-depth; docs + log-redaction). Each scope has concrete test files, test functions, and per-test DoD items. SCN-051-S03 now has explicit DoD coverage in Scope 3. Created scenario-manifest.json with all three scenarios -> linkedTests + evidenceRefs + linkedDoD.

One-shot spec review per Check 5B. Verified spec.md / design.md / scopes.md align with the spec 044 PASETO v4 (Ed25519) live contract; the FR/Token Format Decision tables forbid HMAC/issuer regression; Scope-level Implementation Plans target real files and real test names; scenario-manifest.json linkedTests resolve. No stale or superseded directives surfaced; spec is execution-ready.

R13 parent-expanded implementation. Scope 1: AUTH_BOOTSTRAP_TOKEN production-load gate added to internal/config/config.go::loadAuthConfig. Scope 2: DevDBPasswords + IsDevDBPassword + extractDatabasePassword in new internal/config/secrets.go; SST loader case block in scripts/commands/config.sh; runtime DATABASE_URL dev-default rejection in internal/config/config.go::Validate. Scope 3: log_redaction_test.go (4 tests with LEAKCANARY-* sentinels), docs_required_keys_test.go (3 tests), config_secret_rejection_test.sh (shell), sst_loader_test.go (Go driver). config/smackerel.yaml comment updated. docs/Deployment.md gained Spec 051 Defense-In-Depth Contract section.
All 15 new test functions pass. Full internal/config + internal/auth packages green. Shell test passes both home-lab assertion sub-test and dev canary sub-test.
go test ./internal/config/ ./internal/auth/ -count=1 PASS. Full broader Go test surface unaffected.
No simplification opportunities. New code is minimal: 6-element slice + 2 helpers + 2 case blocks + 4 single-purpose test files.
N/A for this surface. All gates are deterministic startup-time / config-load-time / static-lint paths; no soak window applies.

Security review: error messages NEVER echo secret values (proven by log_redaction_test.go canary suite); they DO name the offending KEY so operators can act. Defense-in-depth means a single-layer regression cannot expose a deployment to a dev-default credential.
docs/Deployment.md gained Spec 051 Defense-In-Depth Contract section. Canonical key names enforced by docs_required_keys_test.go in BOTH docs/Deployment.md and docs/Operations.md.
All 32 DoD items across 3 scopes are checked with inline raw evidence. Per-test names referenced in scopes.md DoD match per-test names in scenario-manifest.json linkedTests.
Independent audit: artifact-lint EXIT=0; traceability-guard EXIT=0; state-transition-guard EXIT=0. Anti-fabrication: every DoD evidence block contains shell command + non-summary raw output.

Adversarial probes: log_redaction_test.go is itself the chaos surface for SCN-051-S03. For SCN-051-S01 and S02, the production-mode gates were probed with each required env var individually missing/dev-default; each path failed loud as designed.
Promotion: status=done, certification.status=done, all 3 scopes status=Done, all DoD items checked. Workflow finalize complete.

Reconcile-to-doc MIGRATE (not new work). Defense-in-depth secret/auth hardening shipped Round 13 (2026-05-13): AUTH_BOOTSTRAP_TOKEN production-load gate, dev-default Postgres password rejection (SST loader + runtime DATABASE_URL), startup log-redaction (LEAKCANARY sentinels) — evidenced under the 'security' phase claim and report.md '### Chaos Evidence'. Additional P0 hardening BUG-051-001 (SEC-HL-001, commit 8fe34750, status=done) closed the home-lab runtime auth-bypass with Red->Green regression proof. Originally filed under 'security'/'chaos' phases + the BUG-051-001 packet rather than a distinct 'harden' phase claim; reconciled into phase records 2026-06-07 by reconcile-to-doc.

executionHistory.summary: Gap probe vs spec 044 implementation. 6 implementation gaps + 5 test gaps recorded in report.md. No source/config edits applied; all material gaps require planning reconciliation or specialist work.

One-shot spec review per Check 5B confirmed spec/design/scopes/scenario-manifest are coherent and execution-ready before R13 implementation began.

R13 parent-expanded implementation of all three scopes. 5 new files + 4 modified files. Total surface: 237 lines added in modified files plus 4 new files (secrets.go, log_redaction_test.go, docs_required_keys_test.go, sst_loader_test.go, config_secret_rejection_test.sh).
15 new test functions all pass. internal/config (3.082s) and internal/auth (15.208s) both green.
